items.md:
* Full range temperature compensated
* Relative humidity and temperature measurement
* Calibrated digital signal
* Outstanding long-term stability
* Extra components not needed
* Long transmission distance
* Low power consumption
* 4 pins packaged and fully interchangeable

AM2303 output calibrated digital signal. It utilizes exclusive digital-signal-collecting-technique and humidity sensing technology, assuring its reliability and stability. Its sensing elements is connected with 8-bit single-chip computer.
items.value: AM2303 output calibrated digital signal. It utilizes exclusive digital-signal-collecting-technique and humidity sensing technology, assuring its reliability and stability. Its sensing elements is connected with 8-bit single-chip computer.

items.md:
Every sensor of this model is temperature compensated and calibrated in accurate calibration chamber and the calibration-coefficient is saved in type of programme in OTP memory, when the sensor is detecting, it will cite coefficient from memory.
Small size & low consumption & long transmission distance(20m) enable AM2303 to be suited in all kinds of harsh application occasions.
items.value:

items.md: Power's voltage should be 3.3-6V DC. When power is supplied to sensor, don't send any instruction to the sensor within one second to pass unstable status. One capacitor valued 100nF can be added between VDD and GND for wave filtering.

items.md: Data is comprised of integral and decimal part, the following is the formula for data.
items.value: Data is comprised of integral and decimal part, the following is the formula for data.

items.md: **AM2303 send out higher data bit firstly!**
items.value: AM2303 send out higher data bit firstly!

items.md: $$ \text{Data} = \text{8bit integral RH data} + \text{8 bit decimal RH data} + \text{8 bit integral T data} + \text{8 bit decimal T data} + \text{8 bit check-sum} $$
items.value: $$ \text{Data} = \text{8bit integral RH data} + \text{8 bit decimal RH data} + \text{8 bit integral T data} + \text{8 bit decimal T data} + \text{8 bit check-sum} $$

items.md: If the data transmission is right, check-sum should be the last 8 bit of "8 bit integral RH data + 8 bit decimal RH data + 8 bit integral T data + 8 bit decimal T data".
items.value: If the data transmission is right, check-sum should be the last 8 bit of "8 bit integral RH data + 8 bit decimal RH data + 8 bit integral T data + 8 bit decimal T data".

items.md: When MCU send start signal, AM2303 change from low-power-consumption-mode to running-mode. When MCU finishs sending the start signal, AM2303 will send response signal of 40-bit data that reflect the relative humidity and temperature information to MCU. Without start signal from MCU, AM2303 will not give response signal to MCU. One start signal for one time's response data that reflect the relative humidity and temperature information from AM2303. AM2303 will change to low-power-consumption-mode when data collecting finish if it doesn't receive start signal from MCU again.
items.value: When MCU send start signal, AM2303 change from low-power-consumption-mode to running-mode. When MCU finishs sending the start signal, AM2303 will send response signal of 40-bit data that reflect the relative humidity and temperature information to MCU. Without start signal from MCU, AM2303 will not give response signal to MCU. One start signal for one time's response data that reflect the relative humidity and temperature information from AM2303. AM2303 will change to low-power-consumption-mode when data collecting finish if it doesn't receive start signal from MCU again.

items.md: Check bellow picture for overall communication process:
items.value: Check bellow picture for overall communication process:

items.md:
```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant MCU
    participant AM2303
    Note over MCU, AM2303: Host computer send out start signal.
    MCU->>AM2303: Pull down (at least 1ms)
    MCU->>AM2303: Pull up (20-40us)
    Note over MCU, AM2303: Sensor send out response signal.
    AM2303->>MCU: Pull down (80us)
    AM2303->>MCU: Pull up (80us)
    Note over MCU, AM2303: Output data: 1bit "0"
    AM2303->>MCU: Pull down (50us)
    AM2303->>MCU: Pull up (26-28us)
    Note over MCU, AM2303: Output data: 1bit "1"
    AM2303->>MCU: Pull down (50us)
    AM2303->>MCU: Pull up (70us)
    Note over MCU, AM2303: Data transmission finished
    AM2303->>MCU: Pull down (50us)
    Note over MCU, AM2303: RL pull up bus's voltage for next transmission
```
items.value:

    Note over MCU, AM2303: Sensor send out response signal.
    AM2303->>MCU: Pull down (80us)
    AM2303->>MCU: Pull up (80us)
    Note over MCU, AM2303: Output data: 1bit "0"
    AM2303->>MCU: Pull down (50us)
    AM2303->>MCU: Pull up (26-28us)
    Note over MCU, AM2303: Output data: 1bit "1"
    AM2303->>MCU: Pull down (50us)
    AM2303->>MCU: Pull up (70us)
    Note over MCU, AM2303: Data transmission finished
    AM2303->>MCU: Pull down (50us)
    Note over MCU, AM2303: RL pull up bus's voltage for next transmission

items.md:
|Host computer send out start signal.|Sensor send out response signal.|Output data: 1bit "0"|Output data: 1bit "1"|Data transmission finished, and RL pull up bus's voltage for next transmission|
|-|-|-|-|-|
|Pull down (at least 1ms)|Pull down 80us|Pull down 50us|Pull down 50us|Sensor pull down bus's voltage 50us|
|Pull up and wait response from sensor (20-40us)|Pull up 80us|Pull up 26-28us|Pull up 70us|Pull up voltage and get ready for sensor's output.|
|Host's signal|Sensor's signal|Sensor's signal|Sensor's signal|Single-bus output|

items.md: # Step 1: MCU send out start signal to AM2303
items.value: Step 1: MCU send out start signal to AM2303

items.md: Data-bus's free status is high voltage level. When communication between MCU and AM2303 begin, program of MCU will transform data-bus's voltage level from high to low level and this process must beyond at least 18ms to ensure AM2303 could detect MCU's signal, then MCU will wait 20-40us for AM2303's response.
items.value: Data-bus's free status is high voltage level. When communication between MCU and AM2303 begin, program of MCU will transform data-bus's voltage level from high to low level and this process must beyond at least 18ms to ensure AM2303 could detect MCU's signal, then MCU will wait 20-40us for AM2303's response.

items.md:
```mermaid sequenceDiagram participant Host participant Sensor Note over Host, Sensor: Single-bus signal (Idle: High VCC) Host->>Host: Start Signal (Low GND, >18ms) Note right of Host: Host computer send start signal
and keep this signal at least 18ms Host->>Host: Wait for Response (High VCC, 20-40us) Note right of Host: Host pull up voltage
and wait sensor's response Sensor->>Sensor: Response Signal (Low GND, 80us) Note left of Sensor: Sensor send out response signal
and keep this signal 80us Sensor->>Sensor: Preparation (High VCC, 80us) Note left of Sensor: Sensor pull up bus's voltage
and keep this signal 80us Note over Host, Sensor: Start data transmission ```
items.value:
sequenceDiagram participant Host participant Sensor Note over Host, Sensor: Single-bus signal (Idle: High VCC) Host->>Host: Start Signal (Low GND, >18ms) Note right of Host: Host computer send start signal
and keep this signal at least 18ms Host->>Host: Wait for Response (High VCC, 20-40us) Note right of Host: Host pull up voltage
and wait sensor's response Sensor->>Sensor: Response Signal (Low GND, 80us) Note left of Sensor: Sensor send out response signal
and keep this signal 80us Sensor->>Sensor: Preparation (High VCC, 80us) Note left of Sensor: Sensor pull up bus's voltage
and keep this signal 80us Note over Host, Sensor: Start data transmission

items.md: # Step 2: AM2303 send response signal to MCU
items.value: Step 2: AM2303 send response signal to MCU

items.md: When AM2303 detect the start signal, AM2303 will send out low-voltage-level signal and this signal last 80us as response signal, then program of AM2303 transform data-bus's voltage level from low to high level and last 80us for AM2303's preparation to send data.
items.value: When AM2303 detect the start signal, AM2303 will send out low-voltage-level signal and this signal last 80us as response signal, then program of AM2303 transform data-bus's voltage level from low to high level and last 80us for AM2303's preparation to send data.

items.md:
(1) Attentions to chemical materials
Vapor from chemical materials may interfere AM2303's sensitive-elements and debase AM2303's sensitivity.
items.value:
(1) Attentions to chemical materials
Vapor from chemical materials may interfere AM2303's sensitive-elements and debase AM2303's sensitivity.

items.md:
(3) Attention to temperature's affection
Relative humidity strongly depend on temperature, that is why we use temperature compensation technology to ensure accurate measurement of RH. But it's still be much better to keep the sensor at same temperature when using.
AM2303 should be mounted at the place as far as possible from parts that may cause change to temperature.
items.value:
(3) Attention to temperature's affection
Relative humidity strongly depend on temperature, that is why we use temperature compensation technology to ensure accurate measurement of RH. But it's still be much better to keep the sensor at same temperature when using.
AM2303 should be mounted at the place as far as possible from parts that may cause change to temperature.

items.md:
(4) Attentions to light
Long time exposure to strong light and ultraviolet may debase AM2303's performance.
items.value:
(4) Attentions to light
Long time exposure to strong light and ultraviolet may debase AM2303's performance.

items.md:
(5) Attentions to connection wires
The connection wires' quality will effect communication's quality and distance, high quality shielding-wire is recommended.
items.value:
(5) Attentions to connection wires
The connection wires' quality will effect communication's quality and distance, high quality shielding-wire is recommended.

items.md:
* Welding temperature should be bellow 260Celsius.
* Avoid using the sensor under dew condition.
* Don't use this product in safety or emergency stop devices or any other occasion that failure of AM2303 may cause personal injury.
Avoid using the sensor under dew condition.
